title: Optimistic Fabric
description: Revolutionize your Minecraft experience with this modpack, which not only doubles your FPS but also unlocks a new level of performance and gameplay immersion.
body:
Elevate your Minecraft journey with this groundbreaking modpack. Experience a game-transforming boost, doubling your FPS while immersing you in a heightened realm of performance and gameplay.

This modpack features a curated selection of performance-enhancing mods including Sodium, Starlight, Clumps, and more. This powerful combination optimizes Minecraft, lightening the load on your PC.

This modpack delivers seamless gameplay by optimizing rendering, accelerating world loading, minimizing chunk memory, streamlining RAM usage, and unlocking peak performance for an unparalleled gaming experience.

These meticulously selected mods were extensively tested and fusion to ensure a seamless, hassle-free experience, eliminating the need for any fiddling.

here are the performance before and after using this mod :
Specification : Ryzen 5 5600X 
                           Rtx 3060 ti
                           4Gb ram Allocated to run Minecraft
Settings : Vanilla Default , Fast Graphics , Clouds Off , Render & Simulation Distance 12 Chunks, 1080p
